text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear excited cheers coming from the<n>distance.
When I get closer, I spot the<n>performers of the
celebration concert<n>rehearsing on an outdoor
stage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're up next, McQueen! Match<n>Spe's pose and
start the<n>choreography from there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! This is far too sudden!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You won't get anywhere thinking like<n>that! It has
to be sudden or you'll<n>never learn to improvise!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This is a little late, but, um... do we<n>really need
improvisation training?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You gotta mentally prepare<n>too! I mean,
you'll probably end up<n>doing something
impromptu during<n>the breaks or even mid-song.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm... That is logical.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You heard her, McQueen! And you<n>better keep
your cool on the big night!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! You're the last personto be educating me on composure!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have to think on your feet to<n>improvise well.
It's about immediately<n>reacting to whatever
someone said or<n>did last.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So when Special Week says "Go get<n>'em!" and
does her dance, I could<n>say... "or go home."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. It's practice to hone our<n>reflexes, so the
key is to keep going,<n>even if things go off the rails!
Okay,<n>let's try this again!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, Hayahide! Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
D-don't get confused! This was just<n>meant to be
an "Ouch, my neck!"<n>pose. My head isn't actually
heavy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Smile, Taishin! Smile!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch... I'm nowhere near done yet.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold! The Golshi legendary<n>technique is
a-coming!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm lettin' loose and... takin' a break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...That was more... ordinary than Iwas anticipating.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Y'all look like I goofed! But what<n>I really did
was throw you off to<n>subvert your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Darn it all... Suzuka, it's up to you<n>now! Pick up
what I'm puttin' down!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um... uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Str...strawberry cake!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... when I hear "take a break," I<n>think of cake.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You've gotta link the dancemove, not come up with some lameline! This isn't comedy improv!Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! You did it, Suzuka! Your<n>awkwardness
was super adorable!<n>Full marks!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehehe! Thank you, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today's practice was such a great<n>time! I laughed
so hard!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, me too. Everyone's ideas<n>came together to
form a dance no one<n>could've expected.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The concert is going to be<n>absolutely
amazing! I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! With our crew, it'll definitely be<n>a
performance full of surprises,<n>that's for sure!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Could that be... why I'm so excited?
